title: feat(helm): Add valueFrom support for environment variables in chart
author: HarK-github

findings.description: PR title/commit uses 'feat(helm): ...' (Conventional Commits) instead of project convention 'helm: env: Add valueFrom support'. Maintainer actively requests commit-guideline fixes before approving.

valueFrom schema only defines configMapKeyRef and secretKeyRef with additionalProperties: false. Kubernetes EnvVarSource also supports fieldRef (Pod metadata) and resourceFieldRef (container resource limits). Users passing these valid Kubernetes types will get a schema validation failure. Either add the missing ref types or remove additionalProperties: false from the valueFrom wrapper.
No accompanying Helm chart test or helm lint example to confirm the schema validates correctly end-to-end. A test case in charts/headlamp/tests/ would increase confidence before chart publication.
oneOf: [{required: [value]}, {required: [valueFrom]}] correctly enforces mutual exclusivity matching the Kubernetes API contract.
